CustomField.description: The API name of the custom field on the target object (specified in Object Name) where the computed rollup value is stored. This must be a writable field with a data type compatible with the rollup result (e.g., Currency or Number for SUM, Number for COUNT). The field must already exist on the target object; NPPatch does not create it automatically. Example: "Total_Donations__c" on Contact.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The field on the target object where the computed rollup result is stored.
CustomField.label: Target Field
